titleStmt.title: Ad philosophum (ap. Joannem Damascenum, Sacra parallela)
titleStmt.author: Didymus Caecus Scr. Eccl. Didymus the Blind

publicationStmt.p: This XML text (filename tlg2102032.xml) was generated by Diogenes (version 4.7.2) from the TLG corpus of classical texts (author number 2102, work number 032), which was once distributed on CD-ROM in a very different file format, and which may be subject to licensing restrictions.

sourceDesc.p: Didymus Caecus Scr. Eccl. (c. A.D. 4), Ad philosophum (ap. Joannem Damascenum, Sacra parallela) (2102: 032); MPG 39.

div.p: Ἐκ μελέτης πολλῆς καὶ ἀσκήσεως ἡ βία καὶ ἀγριότης τῶν παθῶν ἀσθενεῖς.
